name: Aang
description: Aang is the last Airbender and the current Avatar. He must master all four elements to bring balance to the world.

name: Katara
description: Katara is a skilled Waterbender from the Southern Water Tribe who helps Aang on his journey.

name: Zuko
description: Zuko is the banished prince of the Fire Nation who begins by hunting the Avatar but later seeks redemption.
